name: Allscripts (Veradigm) Healthcare EHR API
what_it_does: Allscripts (now Veradigm) EHR REST and FHIR API for ambulatory and acute care clinical data platform. Enables AI agents to manage patient record and clinical data retrieval via FHIR R4, handle medication and prescription data access for medication management agents, access clinical document and encounter data for care coordination, retrieve lab results and diagnostic data for clinical decision support, manage scheduling and appointment data access, handle patient demographic and insurance eligibility queries, access population health analytics and registry data, retrieve quality measure and HEDIS data for value-based care reporting, manage care gap identification and chronic disease management workflows, and integrate clinical data with analytics, population health, and revenue cycle platforms.
use_cases: Retrieving patient clinical data for care coordination agents
Accessing FHIR R4 records for interoperability agents
Monitoring care gaps and quality measures from population health agents
Integrating prescription data with medication management agents
not_for: Consumer personal health apps without healthcare provider integration
Non-clinical business analytics without EHR data access requirements
Large academic medical centers without ambulatory care focus
best_when: A healthcare provider or health IT organization using Allscripts/Veradigm EHR wants AI agents to automate clinical data access, care gap detection, quality reporting, and FHIR-based interoperability.
avoid_when: HIPAA RISK: All EHR data access requires HIPAA Business Associate Agreement and patient authorization under 21st Century Cures Act information blocking rules. AI clinical decision support tools require FDA Software as a Medical Device (SaMD) review. Automated prescription or medication changes require licensed prescriber authorization.

auth.notes: Allscripts/Veradigm uses SMART on FHIR OAuth 2.0 for FHIR R4 endpoints. Legacy Allscripts Unity API uses token-based auth. Developer portal at developer.veradigm.com. FHIR R4 endpoints available for ONC-certified interoperability. Patient-facing apps use patient launch; provider apps use EHR launch. HIPAA BAA required for production access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Developer sandbox available; production requires provider organization relationship
pricing.paid_tiers: API access included with EHR subscription; data network access via Veradigm Data platform
pricing.notes: Chicago, Illinois. Allscripts rebranded as Veradigm (2023). Founded 1986. Public company (MDRX). Ambulatory EHR market. 180,000+ physician users. Veradigm Network provides real-world data for life sciences. Strong presence in independent physician practices and community health. Competes with Epic and Cerner/Oracle Health for ambulatory EHR market share.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; FHIR bulk export for population-level queries

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA BAA required — production EHR data access requires signed Business Associate Agreement; sandbox data only for development
Dual API surface — legacy Allscripts Unity API and newer FHIR R4 endpoints coexist; prefer FHIR R4 for new integrations
Veradigm rebrand — Allscripts rebranded to Veradigm (2023); developer portal and documentation may still reference Allscripts; verify current endpoint URLs
SMART on FHIR launch context — EHR-launched apps require specific SMART launch parameters; patient context passed in token exchange
Provider relationship required — production access requires provider organization as customer; no public API for non-customer developers
Information blocking compliance — 21st Century Cures Act requires timely data sharing; automated blocking or delays have regulatory consequences
agent_readiness.security_notes: Ambulatory EHR clinical data. HIPAA, SOC2, ONC. SMART on FHIR OAuth2. US. Patient clinical records and population health data.

security_score_components.security_notes: EHR patient data. HIPAA, ONC. SMART on FHIR. US. Clinical records and population health.
